name: com.tecvoodoo.mcp-tools
description: Custom MCP tool extensions for Claude AI Game Developer. 58 tool groups covering Flexalon, PWB, RayFire, MagicaCloth2, FinalIK, AssetInventory, MalbersAC, QuestForge, RetargetPro, RopeToolkit, HeathenPhysics, HeathenBallistics, Feel, DamageNumbersPro, Cinemachine, AnimationRigging, ALINE, MasterAudio, A*Pathfinding, DialogueSystem, SensorToolkit, UCC, BehaviorDesigner, DOTween, UnityEntities, UnityPhysics, BroAudio, Koreographer, PMG, Maestro, DryWetMIDI, FMOD, Chunity, Naninovel, AdventureCreator, TextAnimator, InkIntegration, 2.5DTerrain, 2.5DBridgeBuilder, DecalCollider, TextureStudio, AINavigation, Animancer, JuicyActions, BoingKit, MudBun, Lumen, Timeflow, uLipSync, TechnieColliderCreator2, MKEdgeDetection, RealTimeWeatherPro, UltimateTerrain, PressE PRO 2, COZY 3 Stylized Weather, Modular 3D Text, ORK Framework + Makinom, and CityGen3D. Tools auto-activate via MCPToolsDefineManager when target assets are detected.
